image_dependency: Question explicitly asks for the SMILES of the transition-state structure shown in the image.
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is visual rather than textual.
Selecting among very similar SMILES options depends on reading the depicted chemical structure, not just the text.
multi_step: Solver must parse the molecular structure from the image and then compare it against 4 closely related SMILES candidates.
The options differ by subtle structural details, so the task requires more than direct lookup from text.
This is still a relatively short reasoning chain because the output is a single matching option rather than a long derivation or calculation.
verifiability: Answer is a short, exact chemical string and matches one of the provided choices, enabling straightforward exact-match checking.
choice_count=4 constrains the output space and makes rule-based validation practical.
registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and the image asset exists, so the item is well-formed for downstream checking.
